eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Potter, TX; at 01:30 PM ON MAY 18, 2026 Effective until 11:30 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Voluntary Evacuation immediately from Two Deer Trail, White Tail Ave, Bishop Estates due to wildfire. This order is effective until further notice. Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Visit SOCIAL MEDIA for updates. Stay informed via local news or official channels.
